name: prevent_calculator
description: Embeds the AHA PREVENT cardiovascular risk calculator on the chart conditions section. Pulls the latest patient values from the chart, computes 10-year and 30-year risks for ASCVD, Heart Failure, and Total CVD, and saves all six scores back as laboratory Observations.

protocols.description: Action button on the chart conditions section that opens the PREVENT calculator modal.
SimpleAPI route that renders the calculator modal and computes/saves the PREVENT risk scores.

applications.name: PREVENT CVD Calculator
applications.description: Open the AHA PREVENT cardiovascular risk calculator from the chart Plugins tab.
